title.en: Ye Tian let go of his hand and said.

content.en:
Time passed slowly, and the rules of the Extreme Dao in the body of the Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg gradually returned to normal.

After a long time, the problem of this Extreme Ice Phoenix Egg was completely solved.

"Lord of the Ice Phoenix, it's been solved!"

Ye Tian let go of his hand and said.

At this time, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix carefully examined his daughter's egg and confirmed that there was no problem, and after it was perfectly cured, he suddenly felt a little incredible.

"I didn't expect you to actually do it!"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix was surprised.

She already didn't have expectations, she felt that it was really not curable, so she forcibly gave birth to it, although the future potential is not good, but it is better than not being able to conceive it, and it will become a dead egg directly in the future!

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian really did it and cured her daughter.

At this moment, she was really grateful to Ye Tian.

"Say, whatever you want, as long as it's not too much, I'll meet your requirements!" said the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"I want an extreme treasure that will improve and transform the will!"

Ye Tian put forward his own request.

"You want this!" the Lord of the Ice Phoenix was a little surprised.

For her, this treasure is not of much value.

Among the cultivators, if the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Realm wants to break through with his own Extreme Dao, he must condense the will of the Extreme Dao, while the half-step perfect master of the Extreme Realm must gather a large number of Extreme Dao treasures if he wants to condense the will of the Extreme Dao.

However, that kind of extreme treasure that enhances the will is too difficult to find at the end of the realm.

However, in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, although this kind of Extreme Dao treasure is rare, it can still be found a lot, and perhaps this place is more suitable for breeding that kind of Extreme Dao treasure.

And the Extreme Dao creatures do not take the path of creating the Extreme Realm at all, so the demand for this Extreme Dao treasure is not high, but it is also needed, after all, it can improve their will, which is beneficial to their future impact on the perfect controller of the Void Realm.

However, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix felt that Ye Tian should ask for better treasures, such as the opportunity to attack the perfect controller of the Implasal Realm in the future, and so on.

But Ye Tian only needed extreme treasures, which surprised her a little.

"Okay, I can give it to you, but I don't have many of this kind of extreme treasure in my hand, you wait a few days, I can trade more for you, I remember that some of my old friends also have some of this kind of extreme treasure in their hands, otherwise this kind of extreme treasure is too little, I am embarrassed to give it to you!" said the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"Thank you, Lord of the Ice Phoenix!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Then you're waiting here!"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix immediately let Ye Tian rest in a side hall and left the Ice Phoenix Island by himself.

......

Extreme deep sea, blue water palace.

This is the abode of the Extreme Creature, the perfect controller of the True Realm, the Lord of Blue Silver, who is a good friend of hers.

Wow!

The void twisted, a huge ice phoenix came here, and a huge extreme blue dragon flew out of the Blue Water Palace.

"Lord of the Ice Phoenix, you still have time to come to me? The Lord of Blue Silver said.

"No, my daughter has been cured, and I'm here to trade you for the Extreme Treasure to boost your will!" said the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

"Your daughter has been cured? are you lying to me, after so many years, you have not succeeded, and even those old monsters in the extreme realm, they have no good way. "The Lord of Blue Silver was a little unconvinced.

"It's cured!"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix took out his daughter.

When the Lord of Blue Silver saw it, he was immediately shocked, "It's really cured, it seems that it won't be long before it can be perfectly conceived, and the potential may even be above you!"

"You see I didn't lie to you!" said the Lord of the Ice Phoenix with a smile.

"Good fellow, how did you do that?" the Lord of Blue Silver was curious.

Immediately, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix said Ye Tian.

After hearing this, the Lord of Blue Silver was immediately surprised, "That little Void Sparrow is so powerful, it shouldn't be his means, maybe it's a secret technique created by some extreme creature behind him." "

"I also guess so, but if the extreme creature behind him doesn't show up, it's not good for me to investigate, in case I offend the other party. After all, if I can easily treat my daughter, the other party is likely to be the Extreme Perfect Master, and even among the Extreme Perfect Controllers, it is terrifying, and it is not an existence that I can offend. The Lord of the Ice Phoenix said.

"That's right, then don't probe. His request is to ask for the Extreme Treasure, and I will trade it to you!"

The Lord of Blue Silver immediately traded the Extreme Treasure on his body with the Lord of the Ice Phoenix.

Subsequently, the Lord of the Ice Phoenix went to other places to trade a lot of Extreme Treasures, and then returned to the Ice Phoenix Island.

......

"Void Sparrow, this is the extreme treasure you want, these are all for you!"

The Lord of the Ice Phoenix took out a bunch of Extreme Dao Treasures, there are many kinds, but they can all improve their will.

"So much!"

Ye Tian was also shocked.

The Extreme Dao Treasures he had obtained before were nothing compared to these, and with so many Extreme Dao Treasures, he could definitely raise his will to the level of Extreme Dao Will.

"Thank you, Lord of the Ice Phoenix!"

Ye Tian thanked again.

"I just want to thank you!" said the Lord of the Ice Phoenix with a smile, "If you don't mind, you can stay here for a few more days!"

"Okay, then trouble the Lord of the Ice Phoenix!"

Ye Tian agreed.

He felt that it was also possible to refine these Extreme Dao Treasures on Ice Phoenix Island, if he left, if there were strong people robbing him along the way, it would be troublesome, and maybe he would have to lose these Extreme Dao Treasures.

If it is refined, and the will is raised to the extreme will, even if this replica body falls in the future, there will be no loss.

So, Ye Tian stayed on Binghuang Island, retreating and cultivating in a side hall, refining these extreme treasures.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's will was rapidly improved under the tempering of a variety of Extreme Dao treasures, and his will became closer and closer to the Extreme Dao Will.

100,000 eternal years!

Millions of eternal years!

Millions of eternal years!

Ye Tian had been cultivating on Ice Phoenix Island for eighteen million eternal years, refining a large number of Extreme Dao treasures, and finally raised his will to the Extreme Dao Will.

Rumble!!!

The will was transformed, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Will was born, and the strength alone far exceeded the previous will, reaching an incredible level, and the will could also be integrated into the power of the Extreme Dao, and other powerhouses couldn't do it if they wanted to erase his will.

If it was before, a Void Realm Perfect Controller could erase his will in the air and kill him in an instant, but now there is no way to deal with Ye Tian like this.

Moreover, after the will became the will of the Extreme Dao, Ye Tian's combat power increased greatly, and he was not considered a weak person among the super-level perfect controllers, if he encountered the Golden Phoenix Bird again, he would not be able to deal with him if he wanted to kill him easily.

"Hahahaha, I have finally transformed into the will of the Extreme Dao, and the next step is to completely master the Endless Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
